auth.errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

auth.errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many sign-in attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
auth.passwordPolicy.hint: At least 10 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a digit.
auth.passwordPolicy.weak: Password does not meet security requirements.

usersAdmin.subtitle: Create, edit and deactivate office and administration accounts.
usersAdmin.passwordMin: Password must be at least 10 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, and a digit.
usersAdmin.inviteHint: The user receives an invite link by email (or manually to copy).
usersAdmin.inviteMailLogged: SMTP not active — link logged on server (mode: {{mode}}).

onboarding.subtitle: Create your fleet and first admin — no database seed required.

invite.subtitle: Set your password to activate your account.
invite.success: Account activated. Redirecting to sign in…

import.vehiclesHint: Columns: plate_number, brand, model, year, vin, internal_code, status
gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.subtitle: Set up your fleet in a few steps.
gettingStarted.smtpEnabled: SMTP is active — invitations and notifications will be sent.
gettingStarted.smtpDisabled: SMTP is disabled — emails are logged only (development mode).
gettingStarted.smtpTestSent: Test email sent to your address.
gettingStarted.smtpTestLog: SMTP disabled — email logged on server only (mode: {{mode}}).
gettingStarted.smtpTestFailed: Test email could not be sent.
gettingStarted.allDone: All steps complete — your fleet is ready to go.
billing.title: Billing & plans
billing.subtitle: Manage your MyFleet subscription (SEPA direct debit or manual invoice).
billing.stripeNotConfigured: Stripe is not configured — contact support.
billing.manualHint: For early customers without Stripe: activate plan manually and record invoice reference.

requests.subtitle: Review requests from the driver app and apply them to the calendar on approval.

privacy.rights.erasure: Erasure/anonymization (Art. 17) — admin action on driver detail
privacy.rights.adminHint: Administrators perform export and anonymization on behalf of the controller.
